address.streetAddress: 35QQ+M97, 52nd St, TVS Colony, Anna Nagar West Extension, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600101, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
It was officially 2 years ago that I left school!

No matter what's going on in ur life right now school memories always make u happy.. and i really miss my school..❤️ I hated maths period during school days I was scared of my maths teacher. No matter how hard I tried, I was not able to good at math.. her name is Mahalakshmi but now I really miss my teachers.. I miss my classroom . I miss hiding my face behind the girl who sits before me, when my teacher tries to find someone to question. I miss acting as if I don't exist during classes I miss the beautiful feeling when bell rings and teacher goes out..💯

Meenakshi school is the best school ever.. I'm really proud and I'm one of the topper in my school.. ( 2012 to 2022 batch )

itemReviewed.name: Meenakshai Matriculation Higher Secondary School - TS Krishna Colony,Padi

itemListElement.reviewBody: It was my bros centre for CA Examination. Small school and less parking space in a paved street. The Covid-19 guidelines were strictly adhered by them. Temperature Checking at the entrance, verifying the identity, sanitation.etc. Well maintained. Overal 4.3 Stars.👍🤘

itemReviewed.name: Meenakshai Matriculation Higher Secondary School - TS Krishna Colony,Padi

itemListElement.reviewBody: This school is perfect for my son. He has improved dramatically not only in his studies, but also in his overall health. He is more outgoing, likes to do his classwork, and is more motivated towards academics. The support of the teachers has been outstanding. They are willing to try new things and help my child grow and learn at his own pace. They also value and respect my input as a parent.

itemReviewed.name: Meenakshai Matriculation Higher Secondary School - TS Krishna Colony,Padi

itemListElement.reviewBody: Unequivocally, my wife and I made the correct choice when we selected the Meenakshi Matric Higher Secondary School. The way our children’s teachers have helped them develop their individuality, while at the same time emphasizing self-discipline and respect towards others, has truly been a heartening experience. It’s funny sometimes, that as a parent, you learn just as much from your kids as they do.I highly recommend Meenakshi Matric Higher Secondary School! All of the teachers are so kind to each child, truly encouraging each to their strengths. The school is true to the practice and is not a blend, as are other schools that I have observed. Both of my children have thrived under the direction of teachers who have taught here in this School for MANY years. My children LOVE to attend and learn. I am confident that this school has set a solid foundation for their learning path and that they have developed a true love for learning. The school offers yoga and art and music, all of which my children love participating in and have gained an appreciation for each. I am confident we made the BEST choice for our children.

itemReviewed.name: Meenakshai Matriculation Higher Secondary School - TS Krishna Colony,Padi

itemListElement.reviewBody: An excellent school with smart classes. Concentrating on each student and make them score by improving their knowledge and interest unlike other schools which make them mugup the book. Well educated teachers.
